User Story
As a user of the Fish Export Service

I require the digital service to provide me with the ability to check if my data has been transferred to CATCH 

So that I am able to provide this information to the importer

 

Acceptance Criteria
Scenario 1 - new column added 'EU CATCH integration’ - completed documents table

Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

When the page loads

Then the table of Completed documents is updated to include a new column called ‘EU CATCH integration’

And the column appears directly after ‘Status’ and before ‘Action’ in the table

And the value for all rows will be a hyperlink labelled ‘Check status’

 

Scenario 2 - new guidance text added underneath tables

Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

When the page loads

Then underneath the Completed doucments table is an indented message of ‘Refresh the page to check for updates to your catch certificates. Open failed submissions to find out how to fix the problem.’

 

Scenario 3 - Correct routing applied to Check status link

Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

When I click on the ‘Check status’ link

Then I am routed to the relevant page depending on EU CATCH response

Status

Page Navigated To

Successful

/create-catch-certificate/$documentNumber/eu-data-integration-successful

Pending

/create-catch-certificate/$documentNumber/eu-data-integration-pending

Failed

/create-catch-certificate/$documentNumber/eu-data-integration-failed

 

Scenario 4 - Welsh translations

Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

When I have selected Welsh language

Then the text is translated to Welsh

English text

Welsh translation

EU CATCH integration

Integreiddio â system CATCH yr UE

Check status

Gwirio statws

Refresh the page to check for updates to your catch certificates. Open failed submissions to find out how to fix the problem.

Adnewyddwch y tudalen i chwilio am ddiweddariadau i'ch tystysgrifau dalfa. Agorwch gyflwyniadau sydd wedi methu er mwyn gweld sut i ddatrys y broblem.

Scenario 5 - Non-JS

Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

When javascript is turned off

Then all the page must be compliant with non javascript

 

Scenario 6 - Accessibility
Given I have navigated to /create-catch-certificate/catch-certificates on my CC user journey

Then the page must be compliant with GDS accessibility guidelines

Screen Prototype
https://snd-mmo-fes-prototype-wa.azurewebsites.net/gamma/catch/catch-certificates-complete 

The prototype kit uses a newer version of the Welcome to GOV.UK  stylesheet and therefore will look different to current dev and live systems - no changes are required here to update the styling of pages

 

image-20251202-101229.png
Technical Details
Scenario 3 is dependant on the new status pages having been created (linked as ‘blockers’ to this story)

The prototype kit uses a newer version of the gov.uk stylesheet and therefore will look different to current dev and live systems - no changes are required here to update the styling of pages
